# HeptaCert

HeptaCert is a web platform for event management, QR check-in, attendance tracking, digital certificate generation, certificate hosting, and certificate verification.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/
- Discover hub: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/discover
- Public events: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/events
- Organizations: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/organizations
- Certificate verification: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/verify
- Business pricing: https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/pricing/business

## Product Summary

HeptaCert helps organizations manage event registrations, run QR-based check-in, track session attendance, issue branded digital certificates, verify certificate authenticity, and operate custom-domain certificate portals.

## Audience

- Event organizers
- Universities and student communities
- Professional communities
- Training providers
- Companies issuing verifiable certificates

## Key Capabilities

- Event registration forms
- Session-based attendance matrix
- QR check-in and ticket verification
- Offline-capable mobile check-in workflow
- Digital certificate generation
- Public certificate verification
- Organization pages and branded custom domains
- Turkish and English interface

## Contact

Use the contact page at https://cert.heptapusgroup.com/iletisim.
